mnemonics.title: Traversal Order Remember
mnemonics.content: LROOT (Left Root) = Inorder | ROOTLR (Root Left Right) = Preorder | LRROOT (Left Right Root) = Postorder. Think: 'Loving Roommate Ran Late' for LR Root = Postorder.

mnemonics.title: Tree Height Formula
mnemonics.content: Maximum nodes = 2^(h+1) - 1. Remember: 'Height increases, nodes double minus one'.

mnemonics.title: BST Inorder Property
mnemonics.content: Inorder of BST = Sorted Order. 'Inorder Inquires Sorted Items'.

acronyms.usage: A binary tree with left < root < right property enabling O(log n) search.

visualTips.visualization: Draw tree vertically: Depth = how far down from root (root=0). Height = how far up from leaf (leaf=0). Like measuring from top (depth) vs bottom (height).

Perfect: All levels full (pyramid shape). Complete: Fill left to right in last level. Full: Every node has 0 or 2 children (no single children). Picture: Perfect = full pyramid, Complete = pyramid with possible cut right corner, Full = no 'only' children.

Preorder: Open folder, list contents, then recurse. Inorder: Go deep left, visit current, then right. Postorder: Recurse children first, then visit current (like uninstalling software - dependencies first).
Imagine people at checkout: First in line (front) gets served first. Enqueue new people at back. Process front, add its children (next in line) at back.

analogies.analogy: Family tree showing lineage - each person (node) can have up to 2 children (left/right). Root is the oldest ancestor.
Like exploring a cave system: You go as deep as possible (left), mark your spot, backtrack slightly, explore other path (right), then return.
Building floors: Single room = floor 0. Two floors = floor 1. Each level added increases height by 1.
Dictionary organization: Words starting with A-M go left section, N-Z go right. Within left, A-M again, creating efficient search like binary search.
Railway tracks with sidings: Instead of dead-end tracks (NULL), connect them as shortcuts to next station for efficient travel without backtracking.
